notes: Conformance fixtures for scripts/skill-conformance.test.ts. The skill is mostly automatic — it has no nc:prompt directives, only pre-flight checks and capture runs. Two scenarios cover (a) the happy path with a working bridge100 (192.168.64.1), and (b) bridge100 missing so the no-bridge branch exercises its downstream log/warning.
